findings.title: Missing usage description: NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription
findings.detail: Code uses PHPhotoLibrary but NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription is not in Info.plist.
findings.recommendation: Add NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription to Info.plist with a clear user-facing explanation. Missing usage descriptions cause crashes when the permission is requested.

findings.title: UserDefaults used but not declared in PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy
findings.detail: UserDefaults is a required reason API. Its use must be declared in the privacy manifest.
findings.recommendation: Add an entry to NSPrivacyAccessedAPITypes: NSPrivacyAccessedAPIType = 'NSPrivacyAccessedAPICategoryUserDefaults' with the appropriate reason code (CA92.1 for the most common case).

findings.title: UserDefaults used but not declared in PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy
findings.detail: UserDefaults is a required reason API. Its use must be declared in the privacy manifest.
findings.recommendation: Add an entry to NSPrivacyAccessedAPITypes: NSPrivacyAccessedAPIType = 'NSPrivacyAccessedAPICategoryUserDefaults' with the appropriate reason code (CA92.1 for the most common case).

findings.title: Keychain used but keychain-access-groups not in entitlements
findings.detail: Keychain APIs are used in the codebase but keychain-access-groups entitlement was not found.
findings.recommendation: This may be fine if using the default access group, but explicit group configuration is recommended for clarity and future app extensions.
